response.justification: Sarah Smith demonstrates extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with 13+ years of progressive roles, including senior and staff positions. Her expertise aligns well with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). She has led AI-agent infrastructure projects, optimized high-traffic systems, and contributed to open-source platforms. Her background in architecture, testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest), and cloud technologies (AWS, Docker) is strong. However, her current role involves DLang and MCP, which may require a brief adjustment period for the primary stack.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprise projects
Proven track record in architecture, scalability, and performance optimization for high-traffic systems
Hands-on experience with AI-agent development, cloud platforms (AWS, GCP), and containerization (Docker)
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement (though Node.js/TypeScript expertise suggests quick adaptation)
Current role involves DLang and MCP, which may require time to refocus on the specified stack
No explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright testing frameworks in recent roles, though testing expertise is implied

key_factors.factor: Recent role divergence from primary stack (DLang, MCP)
